steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The scientist calls BZMA the best option when "practical considerations" (cost) are weighed in. The correct choice must show BZMA nearly matching the expensive β-cyclodextrin resin while clearly outperforming the other cheap methacrylate resins — proving best value.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — BZMA just below β-cyclodextrin, well above cheap resins: Shows the cost-benefit trade-off directly. ✓
  • Choice B — BZMA inconsistently superior: Performance varies by compound, undermining the general claim. ✗
  • Choice C — BZMA nearly equal to β-cyclodextrin: Erases the cost advantage; no reason to prefer BZMA over the pricier resin. ✗
  • Choice D — BZMA non-unique among cheap resins: BZMA doesn't stand out from other inexpensive options, so it has no special value. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
